allow: Bash(git -c user.name="Aaron Thompson" -c user.email="aamith@gmail.com" commit -m "Initial scaffold: Astro 6 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + MDX")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\([f\\"{a.get\('name','?'\)}\\t{a.get\('slug','?'\)}\\" for a in d]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('build_settings.repo_url:', d.get\('build_settings', {}\).get\('repo_url'\)\); print\('build_settings.cmd:', d.get\('build_settings', {}\).get\('cmd'\)\); print\('build_settings.dir:', d.get\('build_settings', {}\).get\('dir'\)\); print\('build_settings.branch:', d.get\('build_settings', {}\).get\('branch'\)\); print\('published_deploy.url:', d.get\('published_deploy', {}\).get\('url'\) if d.get\('published_deploy'\) else None\); print\('published_deploy.state:', d.get\('published_deploy', {}\).get\('state'\) if d.get\('published_deploy'\) else None\); print\('url:', d.get\('url'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{x.get\('created_at'\)}  state={x.get\('state'\)}  branch={x.get\('branch'\)}  context={x.get\('context'\)}  commit={x.get\('commit_ref',''\)[:8] if x.get\('commit_ref'\) else 'none'}  msg={\(x.get\('title'\) or ''\)[:60]}\\"\) for x in d])
Bash(git -c 'user.name=Aaron Thompson' -c user.email=aamith@gmail.com commit -m 'Add layout, pages, content collections, sample galleries, contact form *)
Bash(git -c user.name="Aaron Thompson" -c user.email="aamith@gmail.com" commit -m "Add empty journal/.gitkeep so glob loader has a base directory")
